_metadata.purpose: Curated exact-match branded blend headers eligible for conservative blend-header anchor scoring.
_metadata.description: Exact-match branded blend headers eligible for conservative blend_header_anchor scoring. Entries require live PubMed verification and remain subject to child-dose guards.

anchors.notes: Urox botanical blend (Crataeva nurvala, Equisetum arvense, Lindera aggregata). PMID 29385990 is a phase 2 randomized, double-blind placebo-controlled trial in overactive bladder/urinary incontinence symptoms.
Xanthigen nutraceutical blend. PMID 19840063 is a randomized controlled trial in weight management among obese premenopausal women with and without non-alcoholic fatty liver disease.

Metabolaid-related polyphenolic extract from Hibiscus sabdariffa and Lippia citriodora. PMID 33810049 is a randomized, double-blind placebo-controlled trial in prehypertensive/type 1 hypertensive subjects.

aliases: acacia catechu wood & bark extract and chinese skullcap root extract
acacia catechu wood and bark extract and chinese skullcap root extract
anchors.notes: Univestin-style Scutellaria baicalensis + Acacia catechu extract combination. PMID 24611484 is a randomized controlled trial for short-term symptomatic relief of knee osteoarthritis joint discomfort.
BR-DIM/diindolylmethane branded complex. PMID 22075942 and PMID 28560655 are randomized controlled trials for DIM biomarker modulation contexts.
